title: 'We carefully verified the silicon-carbon battery so that our users can trust it and use it with competence': Samsung execs on how it tuned the latest battery technology — and why that matters
summary: Samsung wouldn't share the exact amount of silicon-carbon that's in the batteries, but it did confirm that its new Z Fold 8 Ultra, Z Fold 8, and Z Flip 8 phones in every region would feature the new battery technology.
caption: output/2026-07-23/we-carefully-verified-the-silicon-carbon-battery-so-that-our-users-can.txt
